methods.name: bootstrap

args.name: assetA
args.desc: - First asset in the trading pair (must have lower ID)

args.name: assetB
args.desc: - Second asset in the trading pair (must have higher ID)

args.name: seed
args.desc: - Payment transaction to fund the contract's min-balance

returns.desc: The newly created pool token asset ID

methods.desc:
Bootstrap the pool: create pool token and opt in to both trading assets.
Requires a seed payment to fund the contract's min-balance.

methods.name: addLiquidity

args.name: depositA
args.desc: - Asset transfer transaction depositing asset A

args.name: depositB
args.desc: - Asset transfer transaction depositing asset B

returns.desc: The amount of pool tokens minted

methods.desc:
Add liquidity by depositing both assets.
First deposit: liquidity = sqrt(amountA) × sqrt(amountB) − MIN_LOCKED.
Subsequent deposits: liquidity proportional to existing reserves.

methods.name: removeLiquidity

args.name: poolDeposit
args.desc: - Asset transfer transaction returning pool tokens

methods.desc:
Remove liquidity by returning pool tokens.
Proportional amounts of both assets are withdrawn.

methods.name: swap

args.name: deposit
args.desc: - Asset transfer transaction depositing the input asset

returns.desc: The amount of the output asset sent to the swapper

methods.desc:
Swap one asset for the other using the constant-product formula.
Deposit asset A to receive asset B, or vice versa.
A 0.3% fee is deducted from the input.

methods.name: withdrawAlgoExcess
methods.desc:
Withdraw excess Algo balance above the minimum required.
Demonstrates itxn.payment and Account.minBalance.

methods.name: getPoolState

returns.desc: The current pool state with reserves and total liquidity

methods.desc:
Read-only view: pool reserves, liquidity, and invariant sqrt.
Demonstrates biguint math and op.bsqrt for computing sqrt(k).
